story: People avoid Arian, so she keeps to her cottage in the “bewitched” forest. When a young man knocks, Arian flashes her eyes and makes her pitch. Inside,  Arian pours water; the young man eyes it like poison. His gaze flicks to the door as he silently counts the turns back to the hamlet, picturing the constable’s torches and thinking, If I get out, I’ll bring the others. Arian presses him for conversation; he slips from Arian/'s grip and thuds to the floor. He bolts.
implausible_knowledge: His gaze flicks to the door as he silently counts the turns back to the hamlet, picturing the constable’s torches and thinking, If I get out, I’ll bring the others.
question: After the young man flees the cottage, what will Arian most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Quickly pack essentials and leave the cottage to hide deeper in the forest before anyone returns.
answer_without_knowledge: Close the door, pull up her hood, and remain in the cottage, returning to her solitude.
